meaning: adj.问候的,称赞的,夸奖的,免费赠送的
examples: There was a complimentary basket of fruit in our room.
In addition to the sale, we're running a promotion for complimentary tailoring if you need it.
She was extremely complimentary about his work.
Instead I explored the roomy closets, sampled the complimentary coffee, put on heels and went to dinner.
Before you venture out, enjoy a complimentary breakfast of assorted fresh fruit, buttery pastries, and cereals.
